title: Tags
text: Tags Tags are shortcuts to ProcScript modules. The Tags pane lists the tags available in the current trigger. How to Double-click a tag to navigate to the beginning of the associated trigger or entry. To add, delete, or clear tags, select the tag, trigger, or entry and choose the appropriate menu item from the Edit menu or context menu. Icons Table 1. Meaning of Tag Icons Icon Meaning Meaning Tag Marks the beginning of a trigger or entry. Manual Tag Manually-added tags. Compilation Tags Tags automatically added by the compiler when it encounters an error in the ProcScript. Find Tag Tags marking triggers or operations that contain the specified search string. To search in triggers, choose File>Find in Triggers . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
